title: elaphoglossum tejeroanum
intro: Elaphoglossum tejeroanum, also known as Tejero's Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum tejeroanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Elaphoglossum tejeroanum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, although specific herbal preparation instructions may vary.
